arts.ttl: Former Carlisle United captain Huntington joins Bradford
arts.sum: Former Carlisle United captain Paul Huntington has today joined their League Two rivals Bradford City.

arts.ttl: Grimsby boss blames 'horrific' design of Carlisle United goals for keeper injury
arts.sum: Grimsby Town head coach David Artell said the "horrific" design of the goals used at Carlisle United contributed to keeper Jake Eastwood’s injury.

arts.ttl: Notts County star suffers injury blow ahead of Carlisle United trip
arts.sum: Notts County have been hit with a serious injury to star winger Jodi Jones ahead of their midweek trip to Carlisle United.

arts.ttl: 'Brave' Sadi backed to build on first Carlisle United goal
